name: QA 1602
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1602

Exercise RESP proxying using key server command line tools.



Copyright (c) 2019,2024 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce

statusMessage:
[failed, exit status 1] - output mismatch (see 1602.out.bad)
26,67c26,56
< PING
< PONG
< 
< == key server cli set two keys
< OK
< OK
< 
< == pminfo get two metrics
< 
< sample.long.one
<     value 1
< 
< sample.long.ten
<     value 10
< 
< == key server cli get two keys
< 1
< 10
< 
< == key server cli empty key set
< 
< 
< == key server cli handle errors 1
< expected error
< 
< 
< == key server cli handle errors 2
< expected error
< 
< 
< == key server cli nonexistant key
< 
<
